query: heavy fog mist obscured figure barely visible silhouette
message: sub:bad_or_no_details/fog_silhouette — anti_aesthetic — figures lost in mist, dissolved silhouettes, monochrome haze

response.objective_caption: A foggy coastal landscape with a pale sun visible in the upper right and a solitary human figure standing on rocks in the lower right. Dense mist obscures the horizon, blending the calm water and overcast sky into a continuous, uniform expanse.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A foggy coastal landscape rendered in washed-out, desaturated beige tones with flat, shadowless lighting and extremely low contrast. Dense atmospheric haze dissolves all fine detail, reducing the solitary figure on the lower right rocks and the pale upper right sun to soft, indistinct forms against an oppressive, featureless backdrop.
